Range: 101\u20132000."},"returns":{"betId":" Unique bet identifier emitted in BetPlaced event."}},"requestVrf()":{"returns":{"requestId":" The Chainlink request ID (also emitted in VrfRequested)."}},"resolveBet(uint256,bool,bytes)":{"params":{"betId":"The bet to resolve.","serverSig":"65-byte ECDSA signature from resolverSigner.","won":"True if the player wins."}}},"title":"SprmGame","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"VrfFulfilled(uint256,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Emitted when Chainlink VRF fulfills a request.         Server listens for this to update local vrfPath."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"acceptOwnership()":{"notice":"Allows an ownership transfer to be completed by the recipient."},"executeEmergencyExit(uint256)":{"notice":"Claim stake back after EMERGENCY_DELAY has elapsed."},"owner()":{"notice":"Get the current owner"},"placeBet(uint32,uint16,uint16,uint256)":{"notice":"Place a bet. Transfers `amount` SPRM from caller to this contract."},"requestEmergencyExit(uint256)":{"notice":"Signal intent to exit a stuck bet. Starts the 48-hour delay clock."},"requestVrf()":{"notice":"Request a new random value from Chainlink VRF.         Called by the server every VRF_REFRESH_COLS columns.         The subscription must have sufficient LINK."},"resolveBet(uint256,bool,bytes)":{"notice":"Resolve a bet. Server signs keccak256(betId, won, address(this))         and submits the resolution."},"setCoordinator(address)":{"notice":"Sets the VRF Coordinator addressThis method should only be callable by the coordinator or contract owner"},"transferOwnership(address)":{"notice":"Allows an owner to begin transferring ownership to a new address."}},"notice":"Per-bet on-chain resolution for Sprm.Fun with Chainlink VRF v2.5         for provably-fair grid path randomness. VRF Flow:   1. Server calls requestVrf() every VRF_REFRESH_COLS columns.   2. Chainlink VRF calls fulfillRandomWords() with the random value.   3. Contract emits VrfFulfilled(epochId, vrfResult) \u2014 server listens for this.   4. Server uses vrfResult as entropy for deriveWinningRow(), populates local vrfPath. Bet Flow:   1. User approves SPRM, calls placeBet() \u2192 receives betId.   2. Server monitors pointer; when pointer passes bet column, server signs      keccak256(betId, won, address(this)) and calls resolveBet().   3. Win: user receives amount * multNum/100 * (1 - houseEdge) from house bank.      Loss: bet amount goes to treasury. Safety:   - emergencyExitRequest/executeEmergencyExit: user recovers stake after 48h.   - VRF subscription must be funded with LINK before calling requestVrf().","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/SprmGame.sol":"SprmGame"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@chainlink/contracts/=lib/chainlink-brownie-contracts/contracts/",":@openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":chainlink-brownie-contracts/=lib/chainlink-brownie-contracts/",":chainlink/=lib/chainlink/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"lib/chainlink-brownie-contracts/contracts/src/v0.8/shared/access/ConfirmedOwner.sol":{"keccak256":"0xdcb0e9135ddbe71ee27ba99fa06656960c66c964cf2ecb29696da1c1427d9861","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f914a1b638300e82d8f5a020a4195235599afebab4ef1e10c6992f3c90e7df3e","dweb:/ipfs/Qmf2MbuVB16qbCGii3U5cjcBvVjAHHYzKp9voJa2eDch9B"]},"lib/chainlink-brownie-contracts/contracts/src/v0.8/shared/access/ConfirmedOwnerWithProposal.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2422a055657a87e98be61f8f31abb1824ec50fd0f73949f4e3c6ac877efb6da8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fde3b9ac3a4c42ea43e2f92b037d32ab20e30818471c6e20d2590147a6c2958a","dweb:/ipfs/QmQ2ohQP4GnhPUsiWCvCfb1dsoGYDdxSap3dxtnYTV4rmT"]},"lib/chainlink-brownie-contracts/contracts/src/v0.8/shared/interfaces/IOwnable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x885de72b7b4e4f1bf8ba817a3f2bcc37fd9022d342c4ce76782151c30122d767","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://17c636625a5d29a140612db496d2cca9fb4b48c673adb0fd7b3957d287e75921","dweb:/ipfs/QmNoBX8TY424bdQWyQC7y3kpKfgxyWxhLw7KEhhEEoBN9q"]},"lib/chainlink-brownie-contracts/contracts/src/v0.8/vrf/dev/VRFConsumerBaseV2Plus.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0c92838396c5abe72754ebeae526a0434dd53fdaf63e6b98111aebd6114cfcc2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fd0915715c5ad87db245b527514302b6da362894944299dd65c1382ca07b13d4","dweb:/ipfs/QmQ2xcF params._vrfCoordinator: Chainlink VRF Coordinator address.                         Fuji:  0x5C210eF41CD1a72de73bF76eC39637bB0d3d7BEE                         Mainnet: see Chainlink docs
params._vrfKeyHash: Gas lane key hash.                         Fuji 300 gwei: 0xc799bd1e3bd4d1a41cd4968997a4e03dfd2a3c7c04b695881138580163f42887
params._vrfSubscriptionId: Chainlink VRF v2.5 subscription ID (funded with LINK).

returns.betId: Unique bet identifier emitted in BetPlaced event.

returns.requestId: The Chainlink request ID (also emitted in VrfRequested).

acceptOwnership().notice: Allows an ownership transfer to be completed by the recipient.

executeEmergencyExit(uint256).notice: Claim stake back after EMERGENCY_DELAY has elapsed.

placeBet(uint32,uint16,uint16,uint256).notice: Place a bet. Transfers `amount` SPRM from caller to this contract.

requestEmergencyExit(uint256).notice: Signal intent to exit a stuck bet. Starts the 48-hour delay clock.

requestVrf().notice: Request a new random value from Chainlink VRF.         Called by the server every VRF_REFRESH_COLS columns.         The subscription must have sufficient LINK.

resolveBet(uint256,bool,bytes).notice: Resolve a bet. Server signs keccak256(betId, won, address(this))         and submits the resolution.

setCoordinator(address).notice: Sets the VRF Coordinator addressThis method should only be callable by the coordinator or contract owner

transferOwnership(address).notice: Allows an owner to begin transferring ownership to a new address.
